description: Automates multi-site dashboard patrol for daily report collection (日次レポート収集), monitoring dashboard rounds (監視ダッシュボード巡回), and competitive observation (競合観測). Navigates to each dashboard, captures data, aggregates results, and exports.

steps_hint: Capture data and screenshots from each site
Aggregate collected data into a unified view
Export results to Slack, Excel, or PDF
use_cases: 日次レポートの収集と要約
サーバー監視ダッシュボードの巡回
競合サイトの定点観測
hints._comment: Pattern D: multi-site cross-cutting data aggregation. Visits multiple systems and produces a single consolidated output.
